prompt:
Implement a function called 'build_forum_entry' that creates a structured HTML representation of a forum post. The function should incorporate a title, main content, and a list of discussion points, formatting the latter as an HTML unordered list (
    ). The function's name should be build_forum_entry. The function should take 3 arguments, i.e., - post_title: str, the title or main topic of the forum post, - post_body: str, the main body or content of the forum post, - bullet_points: list(str), a collection of user-provided discussion points or options in markdown format. The function should return Returns a string containing the fully formatted and sanitized HTML representation of the forum post, including the header, message body, and safely rendered discussion points. The following setup code will be provided to you: ``` FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

    {header}

    {message}

    {options}" ``` Here's some additional context about the imported packages and global variables: FORUM_POST_FORMAT: str, a predefined HTML template string for forum posts, containing placeholders for the title, main content, and discussion points Please implement the function according to the description and setup above. Output the code in a markdown code block, i.e., between triple backticks (```) with the language specified as Python. EXAMPLE INPUT/OUTPUT: { "input": { "post_title": "Best Pizza Toppings?", "post_body": "Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.", "bullet_points": [ "Pepperoni", "Mushrooms", "Extra Cheese" ] }, "output": "

    Best Pizza Toppings?

    Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.

    • Pepperoni
    • Mushrooms
    • Extra Cheese
    " }
code:
FORUM_POST_FORMAT = "

{header}

{message}

{options}" def build_forum_entry(post_title: str, post_body: str, bullet_points: list[str]) -> str: """ Creates a structured HTML representation of a forum post. Args: post_title: str, the title or main topic of the forum post. post_body: str, the main body or content of the forum post. bullet_points: list(str), a collection of user-provided discussion points. Returns: A string containing the fully formatted HTML representation of the forum post. """ options_html = "
    " for point in bullet_points: options_html += f"
  • {point}
    • " options_html += "
" return FORUM_POST_FORMAT.format(header=post_title, message=post_body, options=options_html) if __name__ == '__main__': # Example Usage: example_input = { "post_title": "Best Pizza Toppings?", "post_body": "Let us discuss our favorite pizza toppings.", "bullet_points": [ "Pepperoni", "Mushrooms", "Extra Cheese" ] } output_html = build_forum_entry( example_input["post_title"], example_input["post_body"], example_input["bullet_points"] ) expected_output = "
